subcodes.first_line: By the Sun of inner meaning, by reason of the oppression of these oppressors hath My frame been bowed and My hair turned white [3.5s]... ...The cruelties inflicted by My oppressors have bowed Me down, and turned My hair white.  Shouldst thou present thyself before My throne
subcodes.first_line_orig: قسم بآفتاب معانی که از ظلم این ظالمان قامتم خم شده و مویم سفید گشته
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
